name: Private Fairway Alpharetta
about: Private Fairway Alpharetta is an indoor golf training studio featuring TrackMan technology for unlimited 24-hour access to private bays. The facility offers a variety of membership options including unlimited monthly plans and punch passes, designed for both regular practice and casual play. The studio emphasizes data-driven improvement with detailed club and ball tracking, allowing members to lower their handicaps through precise feedback and on-demand scheduling.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan technology provides complete club and ball data for every swing
Month-to-month memberships with no long-term contracts
Lowered handicaps by 6-10 strokes according to member data

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed; members can bring their own food and are expected to clean up

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with complete club and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs for practice and simulation sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows BYOB and food. Members are required to clean up after themselves.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Sessions are blocked in 50-minute increments, with up to 2 hours and 50 minutes available for consecutive bookings.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility is focused on adult golf training and does not specifically cater to children.
